display.purpose: Page headlines only; states facts, never shouts (ceiling ~2.4rem).

title.purpose: Lowercase section heads; never a tracked uppercase eyebrow.

body.purpose: Subheads and prose; cap measure at 64ch.

label.purpose: Small uppercase instrument labels above readouts, in Ink Quiet.

mono.purpose: All numbers, hashes, IDs, timestamps, evidence — the voice of the machine.

shadows.name: tier-glow
shadows.purpose: Emitted halo under a Tier 3 citizen dot; dimmer steps for lower tiers.

shadows.name: zerog-glow
shadows.purpose: Pulsing glow marking 0G Compute / 0G Storage moments in a causal chain.

shadows.name: ambient-room
shadows.purpose: Faint blue room light pooled behind headlines; atmosphere, not a component shadow.

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions and the live pulse.

motion.name: live-pulse
motion.purpose: The one piece of ambient motion: the live dot's expanding, fading ring.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Hover/border/background transitions on rows, chips, and links (130ms).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default action button; quiet at rest, signal-blue on hover/focus.
components.css: .ds-btn { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:7px; padding:8px 16px; border:1px solid #323844; border-radius:8px; background:#131518; color:#e4e6ea; font-size:13px; font-weight:500; font-family:ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif; text-decoration:none; transition:border-color .14s ease, background .14s ease; } .ds-btn:hover { border-color:#4f7ef8; background:#4f7ef81f; } .ds-btn:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #4f7ef8; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Compute Chip
components.description: Non-interactive proof badge: reasoned + verified on 0G Compute.
components.css: .ds-chip-compute { font-family:ui-monospace,SF Mono,Menlo,monospace; font-size:10.5px; letter-spacing:.02em; padding:3px 8px; border-radius:5px; color:#4f7ef8; background:#4f7ef81f; border:1px solid rgba(79,126,248,0.2); white-space:nowrap; }

components.name: Storage Chip (verify link)
components.description: Interactive proof badge linking to keyless /verify; fills on hover.
components.css: .ds-chip-storage { font-family:ui-monospace,SF Mono,Menlo,monospace; font-size:10.5px; letter-spacing:.02em; padding:3px 8px; border-radius:5px; color:#4f7ef8; border:1px solid rgba(79,126,248,0.32); text-decoration:none; white-space:nowrap; transition:background .13s ease, border-color .13s ease; } .ds-chip-storage:hover { background:#4f7ef81f; border-color:#4f7ef8; } .ds-chip-storage:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #4f7ef8; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Pending Chip
components.description: Honest absence of an archived trace — dashed, never a fake check.
components.css: .ds-chip-pending { font-family:ui-monospace,SF Mono,Menlo,monospace; font-size:10.5px; letter-spacing:.02em; padding:3px 8px; border-radius:5px; color:#7d8490; border:1px dashed #323844; white-space:nowrap; }

components.name: Instrument Cell
components.description: One readout cell of the instrument cluster: label, large mono value, quiet foot.
components.html: Reasoned + verified22decisions on 0G Compute, TEE ✓
components.css: .ds-cell { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:5px; background:#0e1012; padding:16px 20px; border:1px solid #252a32; border-radius:12px; font-family:ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif; max-width:220px; } .ds-cell-label { font-size:10.5px; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:.1em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#7d8490; } .ds-cell-value { font-family:ui-monospace,SF Mono,Menlo,monospace; font-size:1.75rem; font-weight:600; line-height:1; color:#4f7ef8; } .ds-cell-foot { font-size:11.5px; color:#9aa0a8; line-height:1.45; }

components.name: Feed Row
components.description: A reasoning-ticker row: day, subject sentence, proof chips, hash. Hover recesses.
components.html: D7Ada Cheninvested inMarcus0G Compute ✓0xaa02…7922
components.css: .ds-feed-row { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:16px; padding:11px 16px; background:#131518; border:1px solid #252a32; border-radius:12px; font-family:ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif; transition:background .13s ease; } .ds-feed-row:hover { background:#0e1012; } .ds-feed-day { font-size:12px; font-weight:600; color:#7d8490; } .ds-feed-line { font-size:.875rem; color:#9aa0a8; display:flex; gap:6px; align-items:baseline; } .ds-feed-actor { color:#e4e6ea; font-weight:600; text-decoration:none; border-bottom:1px solid transparent; } .ds-feed-actor:hover { color:#4f7ef8; border-bottom-color:#4f7ef8; } .ds-feed-verb { color:#7d8490; } .ds-feed-hash { font-family:ui-monospace,SF Mono,Menlo,monospace; font-size:11px; color:#7d8490; margin-left:auto; } .ds-chip-compute { font-family:ui-monospace,SF Mono,Menlo,monospace; font-size:10.5px; padding:3px 8px; border-radius:5px; color:#4f7ef8; background:#4f7ef81f; border:1px solid rgba(79,126,248,0.2); white-space:nowrap; }

components.name: Citizen Roster Row
components.description: Tier-coded inhabitant row: glowing tier dot, name, occupation, reputation, wealth.
components.html: Ada ChenFounder71$41,910
components.css: .ds-roster-row { display:grid; grid-template-columns:11px minmax(0,auto) minmax(0,1fr) 48px 88px; align-items:center; gap:12px; padding:9px 6px; background:#131518; border-bottom:1px solid #252a32; font-family:ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif; } .ds-tier { width:9px; height:9px; border-radius:50%; } .ds-tier-3 { background:#9db4ff; box-shadow:0 0 12px 0 rgba(120,150,255,0.7); } .ds-roster-name { font-size:.9rem; font-weight:600; color:#e4e6ea; text-decoration:none; white-space:nowrap; } .ds-roster-name:hover { color:#4f7ef8; } .ds-roster-occ { font-size:12.5px; color:#7d8490; } .ds-roster-rep { font-family:ui-monospace,SF Mono,Menlo,monospace; font-size:13px; color:#e4e6ea; text-align:right; } .ds-roster-wealth { font-family:ui-monospace,SF Mono,Menlo,monospace; font-size:13px; color:#9aa0a8; text-align:right; }

components.name: Live Dot
components.description: The single ambient motion: a breathing pulse that says the world is live now.
components.css: .ds-live { position:relative; display:inline-flex; width:9px; height:9px; vertical-align:middle; } .ds-live-core { width:9px; height:9px; border-radius:50%; background:#4f7ef8; } .ds-live-ring { position:absolute; inset:0; border-radius:50%; background:#4f7ef8; animation:ds-pulse 1.9s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) infinite; } .ds-live-label { font-family:ui-monospace,SF Mono,Menlo,monospace; font-size:11px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.16em; color:#4f7ef8; margin-left:10px; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%{transform:scale(1);opacity:.55;} 70%{transform:scale(3.2);opacity:0;} 100%{transform:scale(3.2);opacity:0;} } @media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){ .ds-live-ring{animation:none;opacity:0;} }

narrative.overview: Civilization-0's interface is a darkened control room over a world that runs without you. The operator observes and verifies an autonomous AI society advancing itself on 0G — never commanding it. Every surface is an instrument: a live pulse that never stops, a stream of telemetry, readouts whose numbers each trace back to an independently-checkable record. Dark is the ambient light of the room, not a style choice; one electric-blue accent reads as a signal on what is live, verified, or on-0G. Density is the point — a tool fluent users trust — but it must always feel inhabited, never a sterile admin panel.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black observatory canvas; one electric-blue signal accent reserved for live / verified / 0G.
Instrument density over decoration — monospace numerics, hairline dividers, telemetry streams.
Flat surfaces, depth by tonal layering and glow — never drop shadows.
Evidence-led: every number is a door to its keyless proof.
Alive, not sterile: a single breathing pulse, tier/org color coding, atmospheric accent glow.

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Blue is a signal, not a brand color. It appears only on what is live, verified, on-0G, a link, or a primary number — never decoration, never inactive states. If blue is on more than ~10% of a screen, something inactive has stolen the signal.

rules.name: The No-Costume Rule
rules.body: Forbidden: gradients, glassmorphism, neon, hexagon motifs, 3D coins. Credibility is carried by real hashes, verified marks, and keyless recovery — not by looking 'crypto'.

rules.name: The Mono-Is-Data Rule
rules.body: If it's a number, hash, ID, timestamp, or on-chain evidence, it is monospace. If it's prose, it's sans. The seam between the two is how the eye separates narration from machine record.

rules.name: The No-Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: Section identity is a lowercase Title plus a small mono meta on the right. The tracked-uppercase kicker above every section is forbidden.

rules.name: The Emitted-Light Rule
rules.body: Depth is darkness (tonal layers) or light (glow) — never a gray drop shadow. If a surface looks like it's floating on a soft gray shadow, recess it or remove the shadow.

dos: Do keep Signal Blue (#4f7ef8) rare — live, verified, on-0G, links, primary numbers only (≤10% of any screen).
Do set every number, hash, ID, and timestamp in mono; keep prose in sans.
Do build depth from tonal layers (#0a0b0d → #0e1012 → #131518) and glow.
Do make each stat a door to its proof — link counts and hashes through to keyless /verify.
Do keep one breath of motion (the live pulse) and tier/org color so dense data still feels inhabited.
Do give every interactive element a :focus-visible Signal-Blue ring and a reduced-motion fallback for all motion.
donts: Don't ship a generic crypto/web3 look — no gradients, glassmorphism, neon, hexagon grids, 3D coins.
Don't ship a sterile corporate dashboard — no lifeless gray KPI-card grid; use the instrument cluster.
Don't use gradient text, background-clip:text, or side-stripe border-left accents anywhere.
Don't put a tracked uppercase eyebrow above sections.
Don't cast gray drop shadows to fake elevation — recess the surface or use glow.
Don't show a fake verified ✓ or 0G Storage ✓ when there is no trace; use the dashed pending chip.
